scripts.link:cli: bun run build:cli && cd packages/cli && bun link
scripts.release:check: bun run build:cli && bun run pack:cli
scripts.publish:cli: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const p='packages/cli/package.json';const pkg=JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8'));const v=String(pkg.version||'0.0.0').split('.').map(Number);if(v.length!==3||v.some(Number.isNaN)) throw new Error('Invalid semver in packages/cli/package.json');v[2]+=1;pkg.version=v.join('.');fs.writeFileSync(p, JSON.stringify(pkg,null,2)+'\n');console.log('ghostcode-cli');console.log('v'+pkg.version);" && cd packages/cli && bun publish
